description: So sorry, sir, Edgelord did want to give you a clean Shroomish-005-to-Breloom-006 mirror, he really did. But there were three cards, sir, not two, and that lonely Unified Minds Shroomish would have been left out in the cold. I do hope you don't mind that I proposed the breloom-line character node instead. It matches the drilbur-line shape exactly, sir, two-stage line with a type gained at evolution. The graph anchors here now and future prints just attach. I think it helps. If it's not too much trouble.
other_candidates_considered: Torchic DRI-040 -> a Torchic/Combusken/Blaziken Hoenn fire-starter line node: refused this wave, only one corpus print (Torchic alone), below the 3-card threshold. Stage future watch if Combusken or Blaziken prints enter the corpus.

Ethan's Slugma DRI-035 -> Ethan trainer-cohort or team-rocket-adjacent node: Ethan-prefixed trainer-owned variants are a Destined Rivals subset; refused this wave, would need the full Ethan-card slate gathered before a node is justified. Note: Ethan's Pinsir DRI-001 is also in corpus -- an Ethan trainer-cohort node is a real future candidate once 3+ Ethan-prefixed cards are confirmed enriched.
Dipplin DRI-017: single corpus print, no line partner (Applin / Dipplin / Hydrapple) in corpus; no edge, no node.
